meta.title: Orthodox Center for Biblical Studies for Children
meta.description: A center offering systematic Coptic Orthodox biblical study for children and youth through progressive curricula and a comprehensive digital platform.

hero.heading: Systematic Biblical Study
hero.subtitle: We offer Coptic Orthodox biblical content through organized curricula for children and youth, via a digital platform that serves churches, servants, and children, aiming to establish a deep, systematic study of the Holy Bible.

about.heading: Who We Are / What We Offer

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: Orthodox Center for Biblical Studies for Children is an educational biblical initiative aimed at providing organized, deep, and age-appropriate study for children and youth through high school within the church, through progressive curricula and a modern digital platform.

whatWeOffer.title: What We Offer
whatWeOffer.description: We offer an integrated path that includes multi-stage biblical curricula, an application serving children, servants, and church management, with tools for tracking, assignments, exams, spiritual encouragement, and continuous motivation.

curricula.title: Progressive Curricula
curricula.description: 5 curricula designed to suit different age groups from nursery to high school

platform.title: Integrated Digital Platform
platform.description: An application connecting churches, servants, and children in one educational experience

church.title: Serving the Church
church.description: Practical tools that help churches and servants deliver more organized study

motivation.title: Motivation & Encouragement
motivation.description: Points, badges, and marathons that make biblical study an enjoyable and interactive experience

audience.heading: Who Do We Serve?
audience.subheading: We serve churches, servants, and children through customized experiences for each group

churches.title: Churches
churches.description: A main dashboard for managing curricula, tracking growth across all classes, and organizing events at the school level.

servants.title: Servants
servants.description: Empowering servants through organized study curricula, auto-graded tests, regular attendance tracking, and direct communication tools.

children.title: Children
children.description: An exciting interactive world where biblical lessons come alive through interactive stories, quizzes, and digital rewards.

curricula.heading: Our Educational Curricula
curricula.subheading: A progressive path of biblical curricula carefully designed to suit different age groups

bibleCharacters.title: Bible Characters
bibleCharacters.description: A suitable introduction to building primary knowledge of Bible characters and key events.

biblicalConcepts.title: Biblical Concepts for Children
biblicalConcepts.description: A curriculum that helps children understand basic biblical concepts in an age-appropriate way.

extendedStudy.title: Extended Bible Study
extendedStudy.description: A deeper journey in organized and progressive Bible study.

servantPrep.title: Bible School Servant Preparation
servantPrep.description: A curriculum aimed at preparing a generation towards service, deeper understanding, and responsibility.

app.heading: A Digital Platform That Serves
app.description: Alongside the curricula, we offer a comprehensive digital application that helps churches, servants, and children track weekly study, assignments, exams, attendance, encouragement points, and progress within each curriculum.

videos.heading: Introductory and Encouraging Videos
videos.subheading: Watch videos that introduce you more to the service, explain the app idea, and present spiritual messages.

items.title: New Updates in the App Experience
items.excerpt: We are constantly working on developing the app experience to better support study, monitoring, and organization.

items.title: New Addition to Educational Content
items.excerpt: Continuous expansion of the provided content to serve the different stages for children and youth.

items.title: Future Steps in Development
items.excerpt: We continue to work on expanding the impact of the service and providing more powerful and organized digital educational tools.

vision.heading: Our Vision for the Future
vision.description: We seek to build an integrated and long-term biblical track that serves children and youth within the church, with continuous development of curricula, expansion of service scope, and the addition of digital tools that help in learning, monitoring, and spiritual growth in a deeper and more impactful way.

pillars.label: Expanding to hymns, Coptic, and ritual

cta.heading: Want to Learn More or Start Connecting With Us?
cta.description: If you represent a church, or want to know more about Orthodox Center, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: A comprehensive journey of biblical study through progressive curricula and a modern digital platform.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Orthodox Center for Biblical Studies for Children — All Rights Reserved

bible.title: Bible Reader
bible.selectPrompt: Select a book and chapter to view verses

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form or reach us directly.
